## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss SEO performance and strategies for improving website traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website metrics show mixed results: clicks and impressions up, but visits slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts not yielding significant traffic increases; new strategies needed](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Off-page SEO tactics (link building, press releases, link exchanges) proposed to boost traffic](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [CTA and banner implementation pending; to be addressed with design team](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [Peak week for clicks (296), though slightly less than previous week](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Impressions up to 22,073 (1,000 more than last week)](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Website visits down by 500 to 2,700 total](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Some articles appearing in featured snippets and "People Also Ask" sections](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Impressions vs. Visits Discussion

  - [Clarified difference between impressions (search result views) and actual website visits](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Debate on value of impressions as a metric; focus shifted to increasing qualified traffic](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current click-through rates vary widely (e.g., 0.65% for one article, 8% for another)](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Strategies for Increasing Traffic

1.  Content Enrichment: Improving 10 best-performing articles (in progress)
2.  Metadata Optimization: Enhancing SEO titles and meta descriptions for better CTR
3.  Backlink Building: Proposed outreach to high domain authority sites for link placement
4.  Press Releases: Suggested using platforms like eXcision for wider reach
5.  Link Exchanges: Reciprocal link placement with relevant, high-traffic websites

### CTA and Banner Implementation

  - [Status update requested on in-content CTAs and banners](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Paola to meet with design team next week to potentially finalize before year-end](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

### Six-Month Performance Review

  - [Scheduled for next week to evaluate current strategy effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Will discuss potential pivots or changes to improve results](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to consult with Jimmy and Marcel about expanding services to include link building](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Paola to meet with design team regarding CTA and banner implementation](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Team to prepare for six-month performance review next week](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Consider implementing off-page SEO tactics (link building, press releases, link exchanges)](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Continue content enrichment and metadata optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/fcaJnQQWJDWvs75U6yVUxGNEwCvGWrQ-?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
